periods.name: Friday Night
periods.short_forecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 11pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 11pm and 2am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 5am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 77. Southwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.short_forecast: Partly Sunny then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after 2pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 89. Northwest wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
